plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Plan Ready

I've explored the entire codebase and produced a detailed implementation plan. Here's a summary of what will be built:

### What gets created: 14 new files under `packages/pixelart/`

**Build/config** (all mirroring `packages/luma`):
- `package.json` — `@ai-sdk/pixelart` v0.0.0, workspace deps on `@ai-sdk/provider` + `@ai-sdk/provider-utils`
- `tsconfig.json`, `tsconfig.build.json`, `tsup.config.ts`, `turbo.json`
- `vitest.node.config.js`, `vitest.edge.config.js`

**Source files:**
- `src/version.ts` — build-time `__PACKAGE_VERSION__` injection
- `src/pixelart-image-settings.ts` — `PixelArtImageModelId` union (`'pixel-art-v1' | 'pixel-art-v2' | (string & {})`) + `PixelArtImageSettings` interface
- `src/pixelart-provider.ts` — `createPixelArt()` + `PixelArtProvider extends ProviderV3`; API key from `PIXELART_API_KEY` env; `languageModel`/`embeddingModel` throw `NoSuchModelError`
- `src/pixelart-image-model.ts` — `PixelArtImageModel implements ImageModelV3`; POSTs to `https://api.pixelart.ai/v1/images/generate`; provider options schema with `style: enum(['pixel','retro','8bit'])` and `pixelDensity: int(1–64)`; issues warnings for unsupported `aspectRatio`/`files`/`mask`; downloads binary images
- `src/index.ts` — re-exports all public API
- `src/pixelart-image-model.test.ts` + `src/pixelart-provider.test.ts` — full unit test coverage

### One existing file modified:
- Root `tsconfig.json` — add `{ "path": "packages/pixelart" }` (required for TypeScript project references; not a provider package)
